dashboard.sousTitre: A real-time overview of your organisation

alertes.cotisationsEnRetard: {count, plural, one {# overdue membership fee} other {# overdue membership fees}}

charts.depensesVide: No expenses recorded for this period
charts.secteursVide: No expenses linked to an intervention sector

notifications.prefsMessage: Customising notification preferences will be available soon.
notifications.videJamais: You have not received any notifications yet.

bell.erreur: Notifications cannot be loaded right now.

parametres.rechercheResultats: {count, plural, one {# category matches} other {# categories match}} “{requete}”

organisation.resume: Identity, logo, contact details, country, language, currency and fiscal year.

utilisateurs.resume: Members, roles, permissions, invitations, sessions and passwords.

documents.resume: Headers, footers, numbering and legal notices.

notifications.resume: Email and in-app channels, business alerts.

integrations.resume: Mobile payments, artificial intelligence, API and webhooks.

abonnement.resume: Current plan, number of users and usage.

organisation.aucuneRaison: Your account is not linked to any organisation: identity settings cannot be loaded.
organisation.identiteVisuelleDesc: Logo and colours reused on exported documents.
organisation.logoUrlAide: Public address of the image (PNG or SVG).
organisation.uploadRaison: The API does not yet expose an upload endpoint dedicated to the organisation logo; only a public URL is stored for now.
organisation.identiteDesc: Legal name, acronym and legal status.
organisation.regionalDesc: Regional settings applied across the whole organisation.
organisation.fuseauRaison: The Organisation model does not store a time zone yet: dates are displayed in the browser time zone.
organisation.exerciceDesc: Opening and closing months of the fiscal year.

utilisateurs.accesRestreintDebut: Member management is restricted to the roles
utilisateurs.accesRestreintFin: Your current role ({role}) only gives access to the permission matrix below.
utilisateurs.membresDesc: Role, status and last sign-in of every account linked to your organisation.
utilisateurs.roleErreur: The role could not be changed
utilisateurs.statutErreur: The status could not be changed
utilisateurs.invitationEmailNonEnvoye: The email could not be sent — share the link manually.
utilisateurs.confirmationRole: The role of {membre} will change from “{ancien}” to “{nouveau}”. Their access rights change immediately.
utilisateurs.confirmationReactiver: Restore access to this organisation for {membre}?
utilisateurs.confirmationDesactiver: Deactivate {membre}? Their active sessions will be closed and they will no longer be able to sign in to this organisation.
utilisateurs.modalDesc: A password setup email is sent to the new user (valid for 24 h).
utilisateurs.champRoleAide: Can be changed at any time from the member list.
utilisateurs.matriceDesc: Read-only — generated from the guards and decorators actually present in the API.
utilisateurs.authDesc: Hardening sign-in for the members of your organisation.
utilisateurs.sessionDesc: Access token valid for 15 minutes, renewed automatically by a refresh token valid for 7 days.
utilisateurs.sessionBientotRaison: These durations are set in the authentication service (auth.service.ts) and cannot be configured per organisation. The interface therefore does not display a setting that would have no effect.

securite.deuxFacteursDesc: A temporary code from your authenticator app is required in addition to your password. This is a per-account setting: it only affects your own account.
securite.etatActifDesc: Enabled on {date}. A code will be requested at every sign-in.
securite.etatInactifDesc: Your account is protected by its password only.
securite.codesSecoursDesc: Use one instead of a code if you lose your phone. Each code works only once.
securite.activationEnAttente: A setup was started but never confirmed. It has no effect on your sign-in.
securite.detailTechnique: TOTP parameters in use: {algorithme}, {chiffres} digits, {periode}-second period — compatible with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, FreeOTP and Aegis.
securite.sessionsDesc: Devices currently signed in to your account. You can only see and revoke your own sessions.
securite.erreurChargementSessions: Your sessions could not be loaded.
securite.noteRotation: “Last renewal” is the last time the access token was issued (every 15 minutes while the session is in use): the Session model does not store a separate activity timestamp.
securite.politiqueDesc: Rules actually enforced by the API when a password is created, reset or changed.
securite.aideNouveauMotDePasse: At least {n} characters, at least 3 character types.
securite.politiqueNonImplementeeRaison: No table can currently store a per-organisation policy, a password history or an expiry date. These rules are therefore not enforced and are not displayed as if they were.
securite.assistantDesc: Add the account to your authenticator app, then enter the code it displays.
securite.etape1: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, Authy, FreeOTP, Aegis…).
securite.etape2: Choose “Add account” then “Enter a setup key” and paste the key below.
securite.etape3: Enter the 6-digit code shown by the app to confirm.
securite.noteQrCode: The QR code is not displayed: no QR generation library is installed in the project, and the secret must not be sent to an external service. Manual entry of the key above is supported by every authenticator app.
securite.codesSecoursModalDesc: Store these codes safely: they will never be shown again.
securite.desactiver2faDesc: Your account will then be protected by its password only.
securite.regenererDesc: The current codes will be invalidated immediately.
securite.motDePasseCourantAide: The API requires your password for this sensitive operation.
securite.erreurMotDePasse: The password could not be changed
securite.sessionIntrouvable: Session not found, please sign in again.
securite.confirmationDifferente: The two passwords do not match.
securite.tropCourt: The password must contain at least {n} characters.

matrice.erreur: The permission matrix could not be loaded.
matrice.appliqueesTitre: Restrictions actually enforced by the API ({count})
matrice.nonAppliqueesDesc: These modules are protected by authentication and organisation isolation, but do not require any specific role. Treat this as security debt, not as a rule.

documents.avertissementDebut: The API does not yet provide an endpoint for the table
documents.avertissementFin: and are not shared with the other members of your organisation. Export headers do however use the name, logo and contact details entered under
documents.enteteDesc: Block displayed at the top of the PDFs generated by the ERP.
documents.piedDesc: Block displayed at the bottom of every exported page.
documents.numerotationDesc: Prefixes used to reference issued documents.
documents.numerotationBientotRaison: Document references are currently generated by each module on the server side. Until these preferences are persisted through the API, they do not change the numbering actually applied.
documents.mentionsDesc: Text reproduced at the bottom of official documents.
documents.mentionsPlaceholder: Registered association · Tax exemption · Registration number…

notificationsCat.canauxDesc: The ways the ERP sends you its notifications.
notificationsCat.aucunCanal: No channel returned by the API.
notificationsCat.canalNonModifiable: Channel enabled by default — cannot be disabled for now.
notificationsCat.canauxBientotRaison: The /notifications/preferences endpoint explicitly returns non-configurable channels: no preference is persisted server-side yet.
notificationsCat.alertesDesc: Events that trigger a notification in the application.
notificationsCat.alertesBientotRaison: These alerts are active for every member of the organisation. The data model does not yet provide a preference per user and per alert type: the switches are therefore shown read-only rather than simulating a save.

cotisation_retard.label: Overdue membership fee
cotisation_retard.desc: Alert when a membership fee is not paid by its due date

budget_depasse.label: Budget overrun
budget_depasse.desc: Alert when a project budget is exceeded

stock_alerte.label: Stock below minimum
stock_alerte.desc: Alert when an item falls below its minimum threshold

nouveau_membre.label: New member registered
nouveau_membre.desc: Notification when a new membership is recorded

paiement_recu.label: Payment received
paiement_recu.desc: Confirmation when a payment is received

rapport_mensuel.label: Monthly report available
rapport_mensuel.desc: Notification when the monthly report is generated

integrations.paiementsDesc: Collecting membership fees and donations via mobile money.
integrations.paiementsBientotTitre: Connecting and disconnecting from the interface
integrations.paiementsBientotRaison: Merchant credentials are provided to the API through environment variables: no endpoint allows connecting or disconnecting a provider from the application. The status shown above only reflects the webhooks actually exposed by the Payments module.
integrations.iaDesc: Assistance features available in the ERP.
integrations.iaBientotTitre: Model choice and custom API key
integrations.iaBientotRaison: The model provider and key are configured at server level; no per-organisation setting is exposed.
integrations.openapiDesc: The API exposes automatically generated Swagger documentation.
integrations.apiBientotRaison: Authentication relies exclusively on session JWTs: there is neither an API key model nor an outbound webhook record in the data schema.

donnees.importDesc: Migrating your existing files in tabular format.
donnees.importNote: Every import goes through a downloadable file template and a validation step before anything is written.
donnees.importBientotTitre: Import for the other modules (projects, accounting, HR, inventory)
donnees.importBientotRaison: The Import module currently exposes only the Members and Donors entities.
donnees.exportDesc: Extracting your data to Excel or PDF.
donnees.exportModuleDesc: ERP lists provide an XLSX and PDF export button composed in the browser.
donnees.exportBientotTitre: Full organisation export as a single archive
donnees.exportBientotRaison: No full export endpoint (data portability) exists on the API side: exports are done module by module.
donnees.sauvegardeBientotRaison: Backups are handled at PostgreSQL infrastructure level by IBIG SOFT. No interface or endpoint drives them from the application: showing a history here would mean inventing data.
donnees.purgeBientotTitre: Deletion of the organisation and its data
donnees.purgeBientotRaison: An irreversible operation that is not exposed in the interface. It must be requested in writing from IBIG SOFT through the Help area.

abonnement.consommationDesc: Figures that can genuinely be measured today.
abonnement.reserveAdmin: Account counts are only visible to an organisation administrator.
abonnement.consommationBientotTitre: Storage volume and number of entries consumed
abonnement.consommationBientotRaison: No usage counter is computed by the API: only the metrics above are real.
abonnement.formuleDesc: Subscribed plan, quotas and billing history.
abonnement.aucunAbonnement: No paid subscription is recorded for this organisation.
abonnement.paiementBientotTitre: Online payment and automatic dunning of unpaid invoices
abonnement.paiementBientotRaison: No payment provider is connected to the API and no dunning is triggered automatically. Payment is currently handled outside the application, with IBIG SOFT.

dashboard.contenu: Your overview: financial KPIs, active projects, alerts and real-time charts.

membres.contenu: Manage your member base, membership fees, positions and participation history.

projets.contenu: Track your projects with the logical framework, MEAL indicators, data collection and reports.

comptabilite.contenu: OHADA/SYCEBNL-compliant journal, general ledger, balance sheet and income statement.

ia.contenu: SARA analyses your data and generates insights, alerts and tailored recommendations.

notifications.contenu: Stay informed of important alerts: deadlines, budget overruns, required actions.
